notableEvents.label: Geraldo Perdomo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Geraldo Perdomo grounds into a double play, first baseman Rafael Devers to shortstop Willy Adames. Corbin Carroll out at 2nd. Geraldo Perdomo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ketel Marte GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Casey Schmitt to first baseman Rafael Devers. Jorge Barrosa out at 2nd. Ketel Marte out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado singles on a ground ball to shortstop Willy Adames. Geraldo Perdomo to 3rd. Geraldo Perdomo advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Willy Adames.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Will Brennan pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Brennan pops out to third baseman Jose Fernandez in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Luis Arraez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Arraez grounds out to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert pops out to catcher Gabriel Moreno in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
